meta.titleDefault: Creative Computer — PC Builds, Service & Parts
meta.description: Computer shop in Metro, Lampung: new & used laptops, gaming PCs, printers, CCTV, accessories, and service. Consult and order directly on WhatsApp.

common.waGeneric: Hi Creative Computer! I'd like to ask about your products/services.

hero.subtitle: New & used laptops, gaming PCs, printers, CCTV, and accessories — plus laptop, PC, printer, and network service. All just a WhatsApp message away.

servicesOverview.title: Four things, one workshop
servicesOverview.subtitle: Everything your computer needs, in one place.

items.title: Laptops
items.desc: New & used laptops with warranty for work, study, and gaming.

items.title: Gaming PCs
items.desc: Custom gaming rigs to fit your budget — try our simulator first.

items.title: Printers & CCTV
items.desc: Home/office printers and CCTV cameras, installation included.

items.title: Service
items.desc: Laptop, PC, printer, and network — diagnosed first, then repaired.

whyUs.title: Buying parts is easy. Finding people you can trust isn't.

items.title: Clear warranty
items.desc: Every component and build is covered, explained transparently up front.

items.title: Experienced techs
items.desc: Handled by people who genuinely know hardware — not just assembly.

items.title: Original parts
items.desc: We sell only new, genuine stock — no surprises down the road.

items.title: Free consultation
items.desc: Not sure what to pick? Chat first and we'll shape a build that fits.

featured.title: A starting point, not a fixed price
featured.subtitle: A look at popular builds. Everything is adjustable — and our simulator helps map out what you actually need.

items.name: Starter Gaming
items.desc: Smooth frame rates in popular 1080p titles without breaking the bank.

items.name: Creator Rig
items.desc: Video editing, rendering, and streaming with a fast CPU and plenty of RAM.

items.name: Office & Study
items.desc: Compact, quiet, and responsive for work, study, and daily multitasking.

items.name: Rizky A.
items.quote: They helped me pick parts for my budget and the build was spotless. Cable management on point.

items.name: Dewi S.
items.quote: WhatsApp consultation was fast and honest. The PC handles a full day of editing with ease.

items.name: Bagas P.
items.quote: Upgraded my old laptop with an SSD and it flies again. Clear pricing, no hidden fees.

ctaBanner.title: Ready to build or need a repair?
ctaBanner.subtitle: Tell us what you need. Fast replies, honest advice, no pressure.

services.title: Everything computer, handled
services.subtitle: Sales, service, and accessories — exactly what our logo promises.

sales.title: Sales
sales.desc: New and used, warrantied and ready to go.

items.name: New Laptops
items.desc: A range of brand-new laptops with official warranty for work, study, and gaming.

items.name: Used Laptops
items.desc: Quality second-hand laptops, thoroughly checked and shop-warrantied.

items.name: Gaming PCs
items.desc: Custom gaming rigs built to your budget and needs — start with our simulator.

items.name: Printers
items.desc: Inkjet, laser, and all-in-one printers for home and office.

items.name: CCTV
items.desc: Security cameras for home and business, installation included.

items.name: Spare Parts
items.desc: Original spare parts and components for both laptops and PCs.

items.name: Accessories
items.desc: Keyboards, mice, headsets, and other supporting peripherals.

items.name: Laptop Service
items.desc: Dead units, slowdowns, keyboards, screens, or hinges — we handle it.

items.name: PC Service
items.desc: Repairs, upgrades, cleaning, and full system reinstalls.

items.name: Printer Service
items.desc: Printing issues, ink systems, and printer repairs.

items.name: Networking
items.desc: Internet network setup and repair for home and office.

services.ctaSubtitle: Message us on WhatsApp — tell us what you need and we'll take it from there.

simulator.title: Assemble your build, see what it's great at
simulator.subtitle: Pick a component in each category. Instead of a price, you instantly see how well the build suits gaming, work, content creation, and everyday use. Happy with it? Send it to WhatsApp for a quote.
simulator.emptyState: Start picking components to see the ratings.
simulator.priceNote: Prices aren't shown — we give you the best quote on WhatsApp based on current stock.

wa.greeting: Hi Creative Computer! I'm interested in this PC build:
wa.closing: Could I get a quote? Thanks!

contact.title: Drop by or chat first
contact.subtitle: Visit the shop to see the goods and consult in person, or start on WhatsApp — whichever is easier for you.

footer.tagline: Sales · Service · Accessories. A trusted computer shop for builds, service, and upgrades.
